name: Cashew Mushroom Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat the oven to gas mark 4 or 350°F (180°C).
2. Heat the oil and fry the onion and garlic until soft.
3. Grind the cashew nuts and mix with the breadcrumbs.
4. Mix in the mashed parsnips and herbs. Add the onion, being sure to scrape all the juices into the mixture.
5. Dissolve the nutritional yeast in the water and mix into the vegetable and nut mixture. Season well.
6. Melt the butter in a skillet and sauté the chopped mushrooms until soft.
7. Grease a 2-pound loaf tin and press half of the nut mixture, followed by a layer of mushrooms, and then the remaining nut mixture.
8. Press everything in well. Cover with foil and bake for 1 hour.
9. When cooked, remove the pan from the oven and let it stand for 10 minutes before turning onto a plate.
10. Serve hot or cold, sliced and accompanied by vegetables or a crisp green salad.
